init.description: Check required tooling, scaffold a recommended template-authoring layout, and optionally verify RHDH connectivity.

templatize.description: Convert an existing codebase into a parameterized Software Template via interactive analyze → review → scaffold → template.yaml → location.yaml flow.

create.description: Guide from-scratch Software Template creation when no reference codebase exists.

add-parameter.description: Add a parameter (or parameter group) to an existing template.yaml with RHDH form conventions.

add-step.description: Add a scaffolder step to an existing template.yaml with correct action IDs and input wiring.

add-skeleton.description: Add or extend skeleton files for an existing template, including Nunjucks parameterization.

create-location.description: Generate or update location.yaml that registers all template.yaml files under templates/.

fix-gotchas.description: Apply common RHDH template corrections (action casing, secrets syntax, raw/endraw, apiVersion) using packaged rules.

validate.description: Local template validation — YAML structure, JSON Schema checks, gotcha rules, optional location.yaml and djLint skeleton lint (--lint-skeleton). No RHDH instance required.

list-actions.description: List Scaffolder actions from a running RHDH instance via GET /api/scaffolder/v2/actions.

dry-run.description: Execute template dry-run against RHDH Scaffolder v2 API without creating real resources.

explain-action.description: Show input/output JSON Schema for a Scaffolder action or parameter schema for a catalog Template.

examples.description: Browse curated reference Software Templates from the official library, AI quickstarts, and bundled skill examples.
